# Reva

> Local-first reinsurance document intelligence MVP using .NET, Blazor, EF Core, SQLite, SQL Server-ready persistence, and a Python document parser worker.

## Docs

- [README](README.md) — overview and quick start
- [Documentation](docs/index.md) — full docs index
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md) — release history

## Optional

- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md) — development workflow
- [Security](SECURITY.md) — vulnerability reporting
